<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Delete OAuth 2.0 Client"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/admin/clients/{id}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Delete an existing OAuth 2.0 Client by its ID.

OAuth 2.0 clients are used to perform OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect flows. Usually, OAuth 2.0 clients are generated for
applications which want to consume your OAuth 2.0 or OpenID Connect capabilities.

Make sure that this endpoint is well protected and only callable by first-party components.

  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
